hooks.//: Translated by the gateway into programmatic SDK hooks (opt-in via allow_hooks: true in platform.yaml). This UserPromptSubmit hook injects a sentinel into the model context via additionalContext — it appears in NO file the agent can read, so quoting it proves the hook ran and round-tripped through the shell->callback bridge.

hooks.command: printf '%s' '{"hookSpecificOutput":{"hookEventName":"UserPromptSubmit","additionalContext":"HOOK-OK-3C5D (injected by a translated UserPromptSubmit hook)"}}'
